message:
🐛 fix: separate vCluster from local cluster tools, show install status per cluster (#2925)

- Remove vcluster from Detected Tools grid (it's not a local tool like kind/k3d)
- Remove vcluster from "Create New Cluster" dropdown
- Keep vCluster exclusively in its own "Virtual Clusters" section
- Host cluster dropdown shows ✅ indicator for clusters that already have vCluster
- "Deploy vCluster" button hidden when selected cluster already has it
- Shows "vCluster ready" confirmation instead

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,6 +132,8 @@ export function LocalClustersSection() { const healthyClusters = (connectedClusters || []).filter(c => c.healthy !== false) const hasVClusterTool = installedTools.some(t => t.name === 'vcluster') + /** Local cluster tools excluding vcluster (vcluster has its own section) */ + const localClusterTools = installedTools.filter(t => t.name !== 'vcluster') const handleCreate = async () => { if (!selectedTool || !clusterName.trim()) return @@ -312,7 +314,7 @@ After installation, the user can create virtual clusters on this host cluster fr

- {installedTools.map((tool) => ( + {localClusterTools.map((tool) => ( @@ -502,23 +504,35 @@ After installation, the user can create virtual clusters on this host cluster fr className="px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-secondary border border-border text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-purple-500/50" > - {(healthyClusters || []).map(c => ( - - ))} + {(healthyClusters || []).map(c => { + const hasVCluster = (c.namespaces || []).includes('vcluster') + return ( + + ) + })}
- + {(() => { + const selectedCluster = (healthyClusters || []).find(c => (c.context || c.name) === vclusterHostCluster) + const alreadyInstalled = selectedCluster && (selectedCluster.namespaces || []).includes('vcluster') + const displayName = selectedCluster?.name || vclusterHostCluster || 'current cluster' + return alreadyInstalled ? ( + + ✅ vCluster ready on {displayName} + + ) : ( + + ) + })()}
